_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of content creation tools and techniques
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of dbt (data build tool) or equivalent transformation framework patterns, including model layering (staging, intermediate, mart), testing, documentation, and lineage generation.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DA domain. Knowledge DA-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-011 (DG, cosine: 0.447), DQ-K-021 (DQ, cosine: 0.430).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.506). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. NICE-only terms [content, creation, techniques, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [build, data, dbt, documentation, equivalent, framework] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.906, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.063 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Knowledge of content creation tools and techniques" and "Knowledge of dbt (data build tool) or equivalent transformation framework patter" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.456 < STS 0.506 (gap -0.050). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [content, creation, techniques] and [build, data, dbt] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. NICE-only: [content, creation, techniques, tools]. WIDAI-only: [build, data, dbt, documentation, equivalent, framework].
